class.name: FmodAudioPreviewInspector
class.brief_description: Editor inspector plugin that adds audio preview functionality for FmodAudioStream resources.
class.description: FmodAudioPreviewInspector is an editor plugin that enhances the inspector interface for [FmodAudioStream] resources. It adds a visual waveform preview and playback controls directly in the inspector panel. This allows developers to preview audio assets without needing to play them in-game or use external tools.

method.name: _can_handle
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if this plugin can handle the given object. Returns [code]true[/code] for [FmodAudioStream] resources.

method.name: _parse_begin
method.description: Called at the beginning of inspector parsing for the given object. Adds the audio preview widget to the inspector.
